verbs.help_summary: kolm init - scaffold a kolm.yaml at the current directory.
kolm signup - provision a new tenant + API key from the CLI.
kolm login - save an API key to ~/.kolm/config.json.
kolm whoami - echo the current tenant + plan + cloud base.
kolm artifacts - list, show, and diff compiled .kolm artifacts.
kolm status - one-line snapshot of where you are. No network.
kolm health - ping the configured cloud base + report timing.
kolm metrics - local dashboard summary from ~/.kolm/jobs.jsonl. No network.
kolm rag - airgapped local retrieval (BM25, no embedder, no network).
kolm changelog - public wave history. No auth, no tenant data.
kolm billing - tenant usage + plan + invoice + breakdown surface. (W409i + W465)
kolm savings - savings-based pricing tracker (baseline vs post-kolm). (W835)
kolm support-bundle - redacted local dump for enterprise support.
kolm key - api-key inspection (NOT the receipt-signing keys — use 'kolm keys' for that).
kolm new - scaffold a spec.json you can compile into a .kolm.
kolm build - one-shot wrapper: scaffold + seed + compile + verify.
kolm compile - build a .kolm artifact (cloud-synthesised or local spec).
kolm train - build a .kolm artifact from a spec or distill a captured namespace.
kolm make - one verb, idea -> shipped artifact. (Wave 359)
kolm ship - publish a .kolm artifact to the marketplace. (Wave 360)
kolm config set ${key} ${value} --scope user
kolm eval - re-run a .kolm's embedded eval set and show per-case results.
kolm bench - reproducible artifact benchmark (alias: benchmark).
kolm score - print this artifact's K-score (per-artifact, not per-model).
kolm list - show every local .kolm artifact (alias: kolm ls).
kolm inspect - show what a .kolm artifact is, in plain text.
kolm eject - unpack a .kolm into a directory of its parts. No lock-in.
kolm diff - compare two .kolm manifests field by field.
kolm verify - run every offline check kolm makes about an artifact
kolm sigstore-attest - upgrade a dry-run sigstore block to a
kolm attest - alias for 'kolm sigstore-attest'. See: kolm sigstore-attest --help.
kolm test - regression + adversarial probes against a .kolm artifact.
kolm serve - expose .kolm artifacts as MCP tools or as an HTTP server.
kolm tui - terminal command center for the kolm product loop.
kolm repl - generic interactive REPL that dispatches any kolm verb.
kolm publish - upload a .kolm artifact to the hub.
kolm pull - download a .kolm artifact from the hub by handle.
kolm hub - browse the unified artifact gallery (curated seeds + user-published).
kolm marketplace - browse, install, and publish .kolm artifacts on the verifiable hub.
kolm sdk - introspect, install, and bootstrap the official Kolm SDKs.
kolm capture - drop-in proxy for OpenAI / Anthropic / OpenRouter that captures (input, output) pairs.
kolm labels - download the captured corpus as JSONL or JSON.
kolm distill - auto-distill a captured namespace into a local LoRA via the kolm trainer bridge.
kolm moe - compose multiple .kolm experts into one router-dispatched composite.
kolm nl - natural-language recipe scaffolder. Describe a recipe in
kolm tokenize - pretokenize text with a kolm-owned byte-level BPE tokenizer.
kolm extract - pull text out of PDFs, HTML, JSON, plain text, and images.
kolm doc - multimodal document completeness checks.
kolm config - inspect or set config keys.
kolm hmac - rotate and inspect the per-tenant receipt-signing key.
kolm keys - Ed25519 signing key rotation lifecycle (wave 193).
kolm auditor - third-party attestation lifecycle (wave 166, N+7).
kolm audit - read-only per-tenant audit ledger. Same view the web
kolm settings - per-tenant account settings. Same surface as
kolm quantize - quantize a compiled adapter via the isolated quantize worker (wave 195).
kolm export - convert a .kolm into a target-runtime artifact (gguf, mlx, onnx, coreml, tensorrt).
kolm runtime - per-call policy decider + runtime-target builder. (W372 + W219)
kolm active-learn - W815 active-learning coverage-gap detector.
kolm meta - W832 kolm-meta meta-distillation model.
kolm autopilot - W775 continuous-background-distill daemon.
kolm failure-to-capture-loop - W816 failure-mode -> capture recommendation glue.
kolm ab - W777 A/B testing.
kolm stat-sig - W778 statistical significance + auto-rollback gate.
kolm jobs - inspect the local jobs registry (~/.kolm/jobs.jsonl). (W229)
kolm lake - data-plane analytics for the local event store. (W369)
kolm optimize - ranked savings opportunities from the lake. (W369)
kolm opportunities - top-level alias for 'kolm optimize list'. (W409m)
kolm dataset - labeled training corpora derived from captured events. (W369)
kolm label - reviewer queue: triage candidate rows one at a time. (W369)
kolm demo - close-the-loop seeded demo so optimize / dataset / bakeoff have data. (W396)
kolm watch - tail the log of a specific job. (W229)
kolm import - W740 symmetric counterpart to "kolm export". Wraps a
kolm services - manage the 3-process split (redactor, compiler, proxy).
kolm bootstrap - one-shot post-install setup for ~/.kolm.
kolm proxy - enterprise drop-in proxy in front of an upstream model API.
kolm connect - THE WEDGE. Local daemon that captures every OpenAI / Anthropic / OpenRouter / Gemini SDK call, redacts, costs, latency-tracks, persists, and forwards upstream with your own API key.
kolm remote - rent compute when local hardware is weak.
kolm mesh - multi-node Tailscale mesh + GKE-scale recipe (single box -> cluster).
kolm migrate - rewrite a legacy v1 spec as a v2-stamped spec.
kolm wrap - emit a wrap-class spec around an external trainer config.
kolm tail - live tail of captured events (SSE from /v1/capture/stream).
kolm sync - cloud-sync of local state, plus legacy git-mirror helpers. (W384)
kolm profile - named CLI profile snapshots (~/.kolm/profiles/). (W229)
kolm install - wire the kolm MCP server into a frontier-agent harness.
kolm tune - evolve an artifact's local adapter from a skeleton LoRA into a living model.
kolm team - multi-tenant workspace management.
kolm tunnel - remote access to a self-hosted .kolm via a signed reverse tunnel.
kolm cloud - real GPU fine-tunes + bring-your-own-cloud deploys.
kolm surfaces - product journey map for users and operators.
kolm packages - package release readiness for SDK, runtime, and installer channels.
kolm evidence - local proof packets for open product readiness gates.
kolm airgap - hard-offline mode (no network egress).
kolm compute - where training runs (local CPU/GPU, cloud, or hybrid).
kolm doctor - sanity-check the environment.
kolm teacher - show where teacher API keys come from and where kolm puts things.
kolm loop - run the value-loop smoke against an in-process router.
kolm logs - tail the local run-history log.
kolm ask - ask in plain English. Routes through the deterministic
kolm chat - interactive natural-language session that EXECUTES commands.
kolm quickstart - guided setup wizard.
kolm chat-tui - terminal model cockpit for signed artifacts.
kolm completion - emit a shell completion script.
kolm upgrade - check for a newer kolm release.
kolm update - self-install the latest kolm from the canonical github source.
kolm models - inspect the local model registry (license + size + recommendation).
kolm gpu - detect, doctor, and stress-test the local accelerator.
kolm seeds - honest, local-first training-data helpers.
kolm anonymize - rule-based PII redaction. Default is 1:1 (N rows in -> N rows out).
kolm redact - token-level PHI/PII redaction wrapper for any teacher API call.
kolm media - multimodal tokenization and redaction worker. OCR, PDF-text, whisper.
kolm reinject - reverse the kolm redact mapping after a teacher API call.
kolm improve - re-distill an artifact from recent low-confidence captures.
kolm instant - synthesise a recipe from a one-line task description.
kolm version - print CLI version and the server contract version.
kolm do - natural-language intent dispatcher.
kolm what - one-screen snapshot of where you are.
kolm quantize --local-worker --mixed-precision ${mode} --in <hf_model_dir> --out <quantized_dir>
kolm explain <artifact.kolm> - plain-English description of an artifact.
kolm fix <artifact.kolm> - auto-iterate on a failing artifact.
kolm synth - synthetic training-data generator (wave 371).
kolm sim - workload + adversary simulators (wave 371).
kolm bakeoff - score-per-dollar bakeoff across cache/rule/small/frontier (wave 371) + multimodal (W466).
kolm devices - operator-registered device fleet. (W372)
kolm install-device - push a .kolm artifact onto a registered device. (W372)
kolm privacy - privacy-membrane scan / smoke / policy / report. (W384)
kolm pipeline - end-to-end compile pipeline (tokenize -> distill -> compile). (W384)
kolm agents - dev-agent telemetry (sessions, recommendations, failures). (W384)
kolm shell-init - emit a shell-export snippet for sh/bash/zsh/fish/pwsh/cmd. (W384)
